ogTitle: Rathscar West vs Ravenhall: Climate Safety

heading: Rathscar West vs Ravenhall — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rathscar West, Victoria and Ravenhall, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rathscar West has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Ravenhall (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rathscar West or Ravenhall safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rathscar West has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Ravenhall scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rathscar West scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Ravenhall scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rathscar West or Ravenhall?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rathscar West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
